---
name: Submit a Copilot Prompt
about: Propose a new Copilot prompt for review and inclusion in the prompt library
title: "[Prompt submission] "
labels: prompt-submission
---

## Department
> Which department is this prompt for? (e.g. Finance, HR, Legal, IT)

---

## Prompt title
> Short, descriptive name for the prompt

---

## Prompt text
> Paste the full Copilot prompt below

---

Which Microsoft 365 Copilot surface(s) have you tested this prompt on? 
> - [ ] Copilot Chat (Web)
> - [ ] Word
> - [ ] Excel
> - [ ] PowerPoint
> - [ ] Outlook
> - [ ] Teams
> - [ ] Researcher
> - [ ] Analyst
> - [ ] Cowork 
> - [ ] Other: _______

---

## Author 
> Who is submitting this prompt? Add your name or your company name or type 'Anonymous'.

---

## Additional Material 
> *(Optional)* Share any supporting material or resources that inspired or complement this prompt.

---

## Tags 
> *(Optional)* Add any keywords that help categorise this prompt (e.g. 'summarisation', 'reporting')
